title: The Best Vanilla+ Modpack
description: This is the official modpack for Home4Ever, a private server run by me. I have been using this modpack for a while, and these mods add to the game while still keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
If you're looking for a new and exciting way to experience Minecraft, consider downloading "Best Vanilla+ Modpack." This modpack offers a new Minecraft feel that will keep you refreshed, but still keeps the highly praised vanilla feel with various mods that add new features and gameplay mechanics. It's designed to be highly compatible with other mods, so you can easily customize your Minecraft experience even further. The mods pre-installed improve the Minecraft aesthetics, so you don't have to take all the time to perfect the best Minecraft experience. With "Best Vanilla+ Modpack," you'll enjoy hours of new gameplay and a fresh take on Minecraft.

Credits: https://pastebin.com/7eJD0Lnp
